description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by large glass windows and doors, especially prominent on the longer facades. A wide, brown-tiled pathway leads up to the main entrance, which is sheltered by a covered porch area. The structure sits on a raised platform or deck that extends around the building, providing outdoor space. The roof sections are slightly offset, creating visual interest and architectural depth. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on horizontal lines and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, multi-level roof, white walls, large windows, and a brown-tiled pathway leading to a covered porch. The design is sleek and geometric, with a raised deck surrounding the structure.
description_view_0: Side view showing the long facade with large glass windows, the covered porch on the left, and the brown-tiled pathway extending to the right.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, brown-tiled pathway, and the covered porch area to the left.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with prominent glass doors and windows, and the raised deck extending around the building.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the back facade, smaller windows, and the continuation of the raised deck.
